title: Section 3
content: 1*** A person belonging to the 2[Indian Reserve Forces] shall be liable to serve beyond the limits of 3[India] as well as within those limits. 4* * * * *
footnote: 1. The brackets and figure "(1)" omitted, by s. 3, ibid. 2. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for "Active Reserve". 3. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956, for "the territories comprised within Part A States and Part C Sates". 4 Sub-section (2) omitted by Act 12 of 1931, s. 3.
